members.name: AddNode
members.signature: public void AddNode(StringName name, AnimationNode node, Vector2 position)
members.summary: Adds a new animation node to the graph. The [param position] is used for display in the editor.

members.name: AddTransition
members.signature: public void AddTransition(StringName from, StringName to, AnimationNodeStateMachineTransition transition)
members.summary: Adds a transition between the given animation nodes.

members.name: GetGraphOffset
members.summary: Returns the draw offset of the graph. Used for display in the editor.

members.name: GetNode
members.summary: Returns the animation node with the given name.

members.name: GetNodeList
members.summary: Returns a list containing the names of all animation nodes in this state machine.

members.name: GetNodeName
members.summary: Returns the given animation node's name.

members.name: GetNodePosition
members.summary: Returns the given animation node's coordinates. Used for display in the editor.

members.name: GetTransition
members.summary: Returns the given transition.

members.name: GetTransitionCount
members.summary: Returns the number of connections in the graph.

members.name: GetTransitionFrom
members.summary: Returns the given transition's start node.

members.name: GetTransitionTo
members.summary: Returns the given transition's end node.

members.name: HasNode
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if the graph contains the given animation node.

members.name: HasTransition
members.signature: public bool HasTransition(StringName from, StringName to)
members.summary: Returns [code]true[/code] if there is a transition between the given animation nodes.

members.name: RemoveNode
members.summary: Deletes the given animation node from the graph.

members.name: RemoveTransition
members.signature: public void RemoveTransition(StringName from, StringName to)
members.summary: Deletes the transition between the two specified animation nodes.

members.name: RemoveTransitionByIndex
members.summary: Deletes the given transition by index.

members.name: RenameNode
members.signature: public void RenameNode(StringName name, StringName newName)
members.summary: Renames the given animation node.

members.name: ReplaceNode
members.signature: public void ReplaceNode(StringName name, AnimationNode node)
members.summary: Replaces the given animation node with a new animation node.

members.name: SetGraphOffset
members.summary: Sets the draw offset of the graph. Used for display in the editor.

members.name: SetNodePosition
members.signature: public void SetNodePosition(StringName name, Vector2 position)
members.summary: Sets the animation node's coordinates. Used for display in the editor.

members.name: AllowTransitionToSelf
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], allows teleport to the self state with [method AnimationNodeStateMachinePlayback.travel]. When the reset option is enabled in [method AnimationNodeStateMachinePlayback.travel], the animation is restarted. If [code]false[/code], nothing happens on the teleportation to the self state.

members.name: ResetEnds
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], treat the cross-fade to the start and end nodes as a blend with the RESET animation. In most cases, when additional cross-fades are performed in the parent [AnimationNode] of the state machine, setting this property to [code]false[/code] and matching the cross-fade time of the parent [AnimationNode] and the state machine's start node and end node gives good results.

members.name: StateMachineType
members.summary: This property can define the process of transitions for different use cases. See also [enum AnimationNodeStateMachine.StateMachineType].

values.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_GROUPED
values.summary: This is a grouped state machine that can be controlled from a parent state machine. It does not work independently. There must be a state machine with [member state_machine_type] of [constant STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_ROOT] or [constant STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_NESTED] in the parent or ancestor.

values.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_NESTED
values.summary: Seeking to the beginning is treated as seeking to the beginning of the animation in the current state. Transition to the end state, or the absence of transitions in each state, is treated as exiting the state machine.

values.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_ROOT
values.summary: Seeking to the beginning is treated as playing from the start state. Transition to the end state is treated as exiting the state machine.

constants.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_ROOT
constants.summary: Seeking to the beginning is treated as playing from the start state. Transition to the end state is treated as exiting the state machine.

constants.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_NESTED
constants.summary: Seeking to the beginning is treated as seeking to the beginning of the animation in the current state. Transition to the end state, or the absence of transitions in each state, is treated as exiting the state machine.

constants.name: STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_GROUPED
constants.summary: This is a grouped state machine that can be controlled from a parent state machine. It does not work independently. There must be a state machine with [member state_machine_type] of [constant STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_ROOT] or [constant STATE_MACHINE_TYPE_NESTED] in the parent or ancestor.
